category_sources: source_facts.description says CLI for passbolt; official GitHub README says it is a CLI tool to interact with Passbolt, an open source password manager for teams.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses go-passbolt-cli; source_facts.name is go-passbolt-cli.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes install, getting started, usage, MFA, server verification, scripting, and documentation sections; passbolt.com/docs is the official Passbolt documentation portal for the broader platform and API.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/passbolt/go-passbolt-cli; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Passbolt CLI; official README describes Passbolt password-manager interaction, MFA, server verification, scripting, and secret exposure to subprocesses.
